rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF JERROLD HARATANI
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #5, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/14/26. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No financial account statements have been filed other than for the Wells Fargo account. (2) It appears that the attorney expense to obtain a certified copy of Letters was billed twice on 7/8/25. (3) Why was there an additional Fine Arts Museum membership disbursement of $99.00 on 2/11/25? (4) The conservator's hourly rate has been increased, but she has not filed a new proposed hourly fee schedule. (An appearance may be required for the Court to determine if the case management services should or could be reduced.) Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 6/30/26. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (Pages in the accounting were collated out of order.)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GEORGETTE KATHLEEN SCARDINA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issue needs to be cleared/addressed: (1) The petitioner filed a "supplement" using Judicial Council Form DE-111. A Judicial Council form should not be used for a supplement to a pleading. CRC 7.104.(b)(2). If the petitioner wished to clear the procedural problems listed in the tentative ruling, her verified supplement in pleading format would have been sufficient, unless the petitioner planned to file an amended petition. Please note that filing an amended petition requires notice and publication. CRC 7.53. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/8/26. (No earlier availability.) (1) The "supplement" filed on 5/15/26 AMENDED the petition. A corrected date of death is not supplemental information. Deadline is 6/26/26 for providing the assigned examiner courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
